## Summary

What are you changing?

## Description

Context, links, or notes.

## Checklist

- [ ] Content ready (`_posts/` and assets if any)
- [ ] Local preview (`bundle exec jekyll serve`)
- [ ] Pushed to `main` (or PR merged)
